what_it_does: Defines a single radial-view BINDING dict named 'semantic' where radius is meaning-distance (1 - cosine, normalized) from a chosen centre item, read off persisted per-space vectors, with angle from kind and a chosen embeddable space (default 'topics').
observations: Comments explain r = 1 - cosine normalized for legibility, read off persisted per-space vectors.
The centre is an item with a vector in `space`; the bridge resolves vectors via store.get_vector and passes them to a pure project() function.
Notes this is 'Group 6' (the CIRCLE / semantic radius); the ANGLE (order-from-edges) is 'Group 10'.
`space` selects which lens space the cosine reads (topics/principles/worldview/repo); a space with no vectors yields an empty meaning-ring (registry-is-truth).
meta {name,is,fills,why} marked TENTATIVE pending Tim/DNA ratification, never machine names.
standouts: Semantic radius defined as normalized cosine distance to an operator-chosen centre item.
Empty-meaning-ring fallback when a space has no vectors (registry-is-truth).
conventions: Same meta field-set (name/is/fills/why) as the other bindings.
Pure project() + bridge separation: vectors resolved outside, projection stays pure.
Operator-law: plain language, never machine names; copy marked TENTATIVE.
notes: A radial view that arranges items by meaning-distance (cosine) to a chosen centre, reading per-space vectors.
questions: How does the operator choose the centre item, and how is its in-space vector required/guaranteed?
Is the default space='topics' overridable per invocation?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — states it arranges items by meaning-closeness to a chosen centre and provides exactly that binding.
intention_signals: Trying to let an operator pick one thing and see everything else arranged by how related in meaning it is, using persisted embeddings.
novelty: The radius-as-meaning-distance binding tied to a per-space embedding choice is distinct among the bindings here.
contribution: Contributes the semantic-radius binding that maps cosine meaning-distance to radial position around a chosen centre, with a selectable embedding space.
summary_for_embedding: A radial-view binding 'semantic' whose radius is normalized cosine meaning-distance from a chosen centre item, reading per-space embeddings (default topics).
intention_for_embedding: To let an operator center on one item and see everything arranged by how close in meaning it is.
